name: Menu_DeuPub
wl_code:
nSumaCeros is int=0
nSumaUnos is int=0
nSumaNegativos is int=0
NGuardaValor is int=0
FOR i=274 TO 275
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, i, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
NGuardaValor=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
IF NGuardaValor=0 THEN
nSumaCeros++
ELSE IF NGuardaValor=1 THEN
nSumaUnos++
ELSE IF NGuardaValor=-1 THEN
nSumaNegativos++

END
END
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 273, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nSumaCeros=2  THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nSumaUnos=2 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nSumaUnos>0 OR nSumaNegativos>0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Menu_Ingresos
